DataType.Name: ESP_VehSpd
DataType.Comment: End Magna Output structure for Message ME_VehInpAdp_ESP_0x318

DataType.Name: ErrorMessageID
DataType.Comment: The Message ID that could not be handled

DataType.Name: CamDeserSerEnableComplete
DataType.Comment: Camera Deserilizer and Serilizer shut down status

DataType.Name: TadState
DataType.Comment: 0: idle, 1: Detection, 2: calibration, 3:Scanning, 4:Turnaround, 5:Angle Detection, 6: tracking lost
